[722.850-1086.150] interviewee: In the last few days, we formed groups. And we went for hikes in the mountains. And I was supposed to be one of the leaders of the groups. But I told them, listen, I cannot go. I have to go back to work. My vacation is through. And I have to be back. And I went back. And somebody else took over. I have to go back to work. My vacation is through. And I have to be back. And I went back. And somebody else took over.
